Container.Name: CinePlete
Container.Overview: CinePlete scans your Plex or Jellyfin movie library and shows exactly what you are missing — from franchises, directors, actors, and classics. Includes a dashboard with charts, Radarr/Overseerr/Jellyseerr integration, Letterboxd import, wishlist, ignore system, and smart authentication.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the CinePlete web interface.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Stores config.yml — persists your settings across updates.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Stores scan results, TMDB cache, wishlist, and logs.
